author: gb9t
content:
Iter 70 — breadth-first Tier-2 wrappers (graphics + media):

- drivers/gpu/drm/00-overview.md: full DRM stack — core (~110 files: drv/file/ioctl/atomic/atomic-helpers/CRTC/plane/connector/encoder/bridge/panel/property/blend/color_mgmt/colorop/edid/displayid/eld/syncobj/lease/vblank/writeback/managed/fb_helper/fbdev_*/client) + memory managers (TTM, GEM-shmem, GEM-DMA) + drm_sched + display sub-tree (DP MST + HDCP + DP-tunnel + DSC + AUX) + per-vendor drivers v0 set (amdgpu Vega→RDNA4 + amdkfd ROCm + amdxcp MI300, i915 Gen2-12.5, xe Xe2+, nouveau, radeon legacy, virtio-gpu, vmwgfx, qxl, ast BMC, mgag200, tiny/bochs+cirrus+simpledrm, gud+udl USB displays). 15 REQ-O / 12 AC-O / 6 mandatory TLA+ models / 3 Verus contracts / 34 Tier-3 children declared.
- drivers/media/00-overview.md: full media subsystem — V4L2 core + videobuf2 + v4l2-mem2mem + v4l2-subdev + v4l2-ctrls + v4l2-flash-led + media-controller (mc/) + DVB core (dvb-core/) + CEC core (cec/) + RC framework (rc/) + USB video (uvcvideo + em28xx + gspca + pwc) + PCI capture (cx18/cx23885/cx88/ivtv/saa7164/bt8xx + Intel IPU3/IPU6) + i2c sensors/encoders/decoders (~150 chips) + dvb-frontends (~150 demods) + tuners + radio receivers. 13 REQ-O / 12 AC-O / 5 mandatory TLA+ models / 3 Verus contracts / 28 Tier-3 children declared.

Total state: 178 .design docs, 43 Tier-2 wrappers (15 top-level + 28 sub-tier-2). Hardware foundation now covers (storage + NIC + USB + GPU + media).

Knowledge pages: design-drivers-gpu-drm-overview, design-drivers-media-overview.

Iter 71 plan: drivers/hid/00-overview.md (HID core + USB HID + Bluetooth HID + I2C HID + drivers/hid/* per-device) + sound/00-overview.md (ALSA core + per-driver soc/usb/pci/firewire/hda).
